info.headline: Flood Warning for Upper Onkaparinga River above Verdun, Onkaparinga River at Woodside and Onkaparinga River at Oakbank
info.description:
Flooding is no longer occurring along the upper Onkaparinga River at Oakbank.
The Onkaparinga River at Woodside is currently at 0.41 m and steady, below the minor flood level. The Onkaparinga River at Woodside is expected to remain below the minor flood level (2.00 m).
The Onkaparinga River at Oakbank is currently at 0.43 m and falling, below the minor flood level. The Onkaparinga River at Oakbank is expected to remain below the minor flood level (1.17 m).
info.instruction:
* Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.
For emergency assistance call SES on telephone number 132 500. In life-threatening emergencies, call 000 (triple zero) immediately.

area.areaDesc: South Australia: Upper Onkaparinga River above Verdun, Onkaparinga River at Woodside and Onkaparinga River at Oakbank

info.headline: Flood Warning for Middle Onkaparinga River between Verdun and Mt Bold Reservoir
info.description: Flooding is no longer occurring along the Aldgate Creek at Aldgate.
info.instruction:
* Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.
For emergency assistance call SES on telephone number 132 500. In life-threatening emergencies, call 000 (triple zero) immediately.

area.areaDesc: South Australia: Middle Onkaparinga River between Verdun and Mt Bold Reservoir
